repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 says ExactID catalogue is seed-time empty; closest banked eid_bjs_efficient_event_study targets staggered-DiD IF gaps, not ATE DML/LRO/ADML variance rules

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: fixed-overlap orthogonal/asymptotically linear inference ingredients

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 empty ExactID catalogue; eid_bjs_efficient_event_study is panel event-study IF equivalence, not weak-overlap ATE studentization

published_prior_art.cite: Dorn2025WeakOverlapDR and MaSantAnnaSasakiUra2026WeakOverlapDR are closest weak-overlap DR comparators; neither states a DML--LRO--ADML variance-rule iff frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv is an LP/SVAR cumulant-matching partial-ID proposal, only analogous as a primitive-witness discipline

published_prior_art.cite: CrumpHotzImbensMitnik2009, HongLeungLi2020, ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022RR motivate weak overlap/Riesz instability but do not give the proposed two-cell DML--LRO--ADML separation witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist misses Ma, Sant'Anna, Sasaki, and Ura, 'Doubly Robust Estimators with Weak Overlap' (arXiv:2304.08974, v3 Apr. 2026), a closer weak-overlap DR comparator that preserves original causal targets after trimming/bias correction.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption variance-linear leaves xi_{m,n} uncontrolled when Delta_{m,n} has a positive nonzero limit, so the iff and N(0,(1+delta)^{-1}) scale claims are not determined by Delta alone.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The two-cell assumption requires a_{B,n}^2/V_n -> eta_B>0 even though e_n(x_B)=1/2 and bounded residual variance make the K_n-energy of cell B O(1) while V_n asymp kappa_n^{-1}; this normalization is inconsistent as written.

soundness_flags.label: Fixed-overlap collapse
soundness_flags.one_line: The corollary says ratio consistency plus Assumption variance-linear forces Delta_{m,n}->0, but xi_{m,n} could offset Delta unless xi is controlled beyond the Delta->0 case or kernel nondegeneracy is also assumed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Strengthen Assumption variance-linear to give uniform xi_{m,n}=o_p(1), or explicitly include the limiting variance-rule residual in the frontier index so the iff is stated for the full observable variance-ratio limit.
Repair the two-cell witness by either dropping eta_B>0 and proving strict separation with a_B^2/V_n->0, or adding a second weak-overlap cell whose K_n-energy is genuinely of order V_n.
Add MaSantAnnaSasakiUra2026WeakOverlapDR to §5 and explain why bias-corrected trimmed DR weak-overlap inference is orthogonal to the proposed studentization-only DML/LRO/ADML variance-rule frontier.
For flagship strength, make the projection index explicitly computable from observable finite-support matrices for each named published variance rule, not just from abstract Gateaux adjoint ranges.

recommended_next_step: Revise the variance-linearization and two-cell normalization first, then add the missed weak-overlap DR comparator before resubmitting.
